issues.title: Remix Flights require real-player fairness and replay validation
issues.workaround: Use the v1.6 closed test to measure modifier comprehension, route completion, retries, abandonment, and voluntary second-route starts.

issues.title: Progress is stored on the current device and browser
issues.workaround: Use Settings → Data → Export progress backup before changing devices, browsers, or site domains.

issues.title: iPhone and iPad installation uses Safari Add to Home Screen
issues.workaround: Open Paper Flock in Safari, then use Share → Add to Home Screen.

issues.title: Normal browser tabs may show browser navigation controls
issues.workaround: Install Paper Flock to the Home Screen for the most game-like display.

issues.title: Existing saved players are not interrupted by the tutorial
issues.workaround: Open Settings → Game → Replay how to play.

issues.title: Closed-test diagnostics remain local until exported
issues.workaround: Use Settings → Data → Export tester report when a tester chooses to share a privacy-safe diagnostic summary.

issues.title: Sound defaults to on for new and reset player profiles
issues.workaround: Existing explicit choices are preserved. Sound can be disabled in Settings.
